questions.question: Explain the purpose of Internet Key Exchange (IKE) protocol in IP Security. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the role of IKE in establishing and managing IPsec security associations.

questions.question: What is the function of Encapsulating Security Payload (ESP) protocol in IP Security? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the encryption and authentication process using ESP in IPsec.

questions.question: Explain the concept of combining security associations in IP Security. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the process of combining multiple security associations into a single association, including the benefits and limitations.
